title: Foundation namespace creation + file moves
acceptance_criteria: src/Foundation/ directory created with all Foundation files
Item.php, Sizer.php moved from Grid/ to Foundation/
Drawable.php, Buffer.php, Cell.php, StyleParser.php, Rect.php created as new files
Color.php aliased or moved from Grid/ to Foundation/
Theme.php moved from Grid/ to Foundation/
All internal use statements in moved files updated (Grid\Foo → Foundation\Foo)
All files use correct namespace SugarCraft\Dash\Foundation\
Technical debt TD-6 fixed inline: any file with >1 class split to own PSR-4 file

notes.td_fixes: TD-6: Split files with >1 class into own PSR-4 files. TD-1: Convert readonly constructor-promoted + clone-mutate to private non-readonly or named constructors.
notes.new_files: Drawable.php (interface GetRect/SetRect/Draw/Lock), Buffer.php (Cell[][] grid), Cell.php (rune + style), StyleParser.php (ParseStyles inline syntax), Rect.php (image.Rectangle equivalent)
